Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process has steps C CR DV RDS optional FC II optional CA AP P N CL There can be loops between DV and RDS and between FC and II

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants Python code constructing the Petri net using pm4py library The code should create places and transitions accordingly with arcs connecting them and define initial and final markings

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: They likely want a start place representing new claim arriving Then transition Insurance Claim leading to a place after C Then continue with Claim Registration CR

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The question says the initial marking should place a token in a start place representing a new claim arriving So we should have a place Start that is initial Then transition Insurance Claim from start to a place representing claim filed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequence is CR then DV then FC then CA then AP then P then N then CL In some cases loops after DV there can be RDS and after FC there can be II

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can define places such as start claim filed claim registered doc verification fraud checked claim assessed approved payment notification closed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After RDS the documents are re submitted which then leads to DV again So we can connect RDS from the place after DV back to the place before DV

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After FC if doubts do II then go back to FC So we can connect II from the place after FC back to the place before FC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus the net can be built with start to Insurance Claim to claim filed to Claim Registration to claim registered to Document Verification to doc verification with loops through Re Document Submission and In depth Investigation and then continue through Claim Assessment Approval Payment Notification Closure to closed final place

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Initial marking is one token in start Final marking is one token in closed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The transition label is given as the second argument to the Transition constructor so we can set both name and label to the activity name
